meanings.definition: lacking definite form or limits; - H.T.Moore
examples: gropes among cloudy issues toward a feeble conclusion
nebulous distinction between pride and conceit

meanings.definition: of or relating to or resembling a nebula
examples: the nebular hypothesis of the origin of the solar system

meanings.definition: lacking definition or definite content; ; - Jane Austen
examples: unfixed as were her general notions of what men ought to be
